steps.t: Dannenglor is to the north of the Haunted Inn. Fernachar has asked you to search the ruins of Dannenglor for signs of the Elf-scouts who went that way…
Fernachar awaits you in the Haunted Inn in the Dourstocks, south of Dannenglor. You should speak with Fernachar and tell him of the worrying scene you…
